name: Med BioGene Inc.
summary: Med BioGene Inc. does not have significant operations. Previously, it was engaged in the life science business with a focus on the development and commercialization of genomic-based clinical tests for non-small-cell lung cancer. The company focuses on the commercialization of technologies in various industrial sectors. Med BioGene Inc. was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
